Euangelium Secundum Mattheum

IN WEST-SAXON
EDITED FROM THE MANUSCRIPTS
BY

CAROLINE DONOVAN PROFESSOR OF ENGLISH LITERATURE IN THE JOHNS HOPKINS UNIVERSITY
God hine gōdode swā þæt hē hine āwende of tollere tō apostole,
and him forgeaf ðā gife þæt hē āwrāt & forman Crīstes-bōc.
Ælfric
